mandatory_criteria.name: R&D Personnel Count
mandatory_criteria.findings: The company employs 38 full-time R&D personnel, exceeding the minimum requirement of 15 FTE.

mandatory_criteria.name: Domestic R&D Activities
mandatory_criteria.findings: All R&D activities are conducted within Turkey.
mandatory_criteria.evidence: The R&D facility is located in Gebze, Kocaeli, and all projects are based in Turkey.

mandatory_criteria.name: R&D Management Capability
mandatory_criteria.findings: The company demonstrates sufficient R&D management capacity with a dedicated directorate and structured project management.
mandatory_criteria.evidence: R&D directorate operates independently with its own budget and recruitment authority.

mandatory_criteria.name: Physical Access Control
mandatory_criteria.findings: The R&D facility has controlled access via a badge system.
mandatory_criteria.evidence: Document mentions controlled access to the R&D facility.

mandatory_criteria.name: Defined R&D Projects
mandatory_criteria.findings: The company has 5 active R&D projects with defined scope, duration, budget, and personnel requirements.
mandatory_criteria.evidence: Project details provided in the document.

mandatory_criteria.name: Separate Organizational Unit
mandatory_criteria.findings: The R&D center is organized as a separate unit within the company.
mandatory_criteria.evidence: The R&D facility is physically separated from production and administrative units.

performance_indicators.name: R&D Expenditure / Revenue Ratio
performance_indicators.findings: R&D expenditure has increased to 17.8% of total revenue in 2024, showing a positive trend.
recommendations: Continue to increase R&D expenditure to maintain or improve this ratio.

performance_indicators.name: Registered Patents
performance_indicators.findings: The company holds 2 granted patents and has 3 pending patents.
recommendations: Focus on increasing the number of granted patents through innovation.

performance_indicators.name: Postgraduate Researcher Ratio
performance_indicators.findings: 8 out of 38 R&D personnel hold postgraduate degrees, resulting in a ratio of approximately 21%.
recommendations: Encourage more R&D personnel to pursue postgraduate education.

performance_indicators.name: Total Researcher Ratio
performance_indicators.findings: All personnel in the R&D department are researchers, resulting in a 100% ratio.

performance_indicators.name: New Product Revenue Ratio
performance_indicators.findings: Specific revenue from new products resulting from R&D is not detailed in the document.
recommendations: Track and report revenue from new products more explicitly.

performance_indicators.name: University-Industry Collaboration
performance_indicators.findings: The company has multiple collaborations with universities and has co-authored several papers.
recommendations: Expand collaborations to include more universities and research projects.

performance_indicators.name: International Project Support
performance_indicators.findings: No mention of internationally supported R&D projects.
recommendations: Seek opportunities for international collaboration and funding.

overall_assessment: Novatek Teknoloji A.S. meets all mandatory criteria for R&D Center status and shows strong performance in several indicators, particularly in R&D management and university collaboration.
critical_gaps: Lack of detailed reporting on revenue from new products.
action_plan: Implement a system to track and report revenue from new products.
Explore opportunities for international collaboration and apply for international R&D funding.

estimated_incentives.rd_tax_deduction: Eligible for additional deductions based on performance improvements.
